entities.description: generation process is the final stage where retrieved information is synthesized and analyzed to formulate a coherent response
analysis   merging is the specific activity within the generation stage that synthesizes fragmented evidence
retrieved information refers to the data collected and brought into the generation stage for processing
fragmented pieces of evidence are the specific  incomplete data items that are synthesized during the process
coherent response is the final output formulated by the generation stage after analysis

relations.description: analysis   merging is a sub stage or activity performed within the generation process
retrieved information enters the generation process as its primary input
analysis   merging synthesizes the fragmented pieces of evidence
the generation process formulates the coherent response as its final output
analysis   merging contributes to the formulation of the coherent response through final analysis
